title: Release QA / Multi Device Visual Simulation
notices: Visual test uses Chromium viewports for Desktop, iPad portrait, iPad landscape and iPhone-sized iOS viewport.
True physical iOS Safari rendering cannot be fully replaced by headless Chromium; real device smoke test remains recommended before public release.
Inline QA environment uses a storage polyfill because localStorage is blocked in opaque-origin set_content tests; localhost/browser tests are unaffected.
fixesApplied: Added release-qa-engine.js for DOM/layout/engine health metrics.
Added phase25-release-qa-fixes.css to prevent closed question overview drawer from creating horizontal overflow.
Updated ArchitectureGuard and Service Worker asset list.
